job_description:
Position: Social Media Promoter Location: Infopark Koratty Experience: 3+ Years Employment Type: Full-Time Salary: ₹35K to ₹40K Joining: Immediate Joiners Preferred

Job Summary

We are seeking a creative and results-oriented Social Media Promoter to enhance brand awareness, increase audience engagement, and generate leads across various social media platforms. The ideal candidate should have experience in content promotion, community engagement, campaign execution, and social media growth strategies.

Key Responsibilities

  • Promote the company's products, services, and campaigns across social media platforms.
  • Create, schedule, and publish engaging content on Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, and other relevant platforms.
  • Increase followers, reach, engagement, and brand visibility through organic and paid promotional activities.
  • Respond to comments, messages, and inquiries in a timely and professional manner.
  • Collaborate with the marketing and design teams to create promotional content and campaigns.
  • Track and analyze social media performance metrics and provide regular reports.
  • Identify social media trends, competitor activities, and growth opportunities.
  • Coordinate influencer collaborations and promotional partnerships when required.
  • Support lead generation and conversion activities through social media campaigns.

Requirements

  • Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.
  • 3+ years of experience in social media promotion, digital marketing, or social media management.
  • Strong knowledge of Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, and other social media platforms.
  • Experience with social media scheduling and analytics tools.
  • Excellent communication and content-writing skills.
  • Creative mindset with an understanding of current digital trends.
  • Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.

Preferred Skills

  • Knowledge of Meta Ads and social media advertising.
  • Basic graphic design skills using Canva or similar tools.
  • Experience in lead generation and campaign management.

Contact: Share your resume at thr@90plus.in.
summary: Creative Social Media Promoter with 3+ years experience to drive engagement, manage campaigns, and boost brand visibility through strategic content and analytics.

job_description:
Job Title: Technical Recruiter (IT Recruitment) Experience: 5+ Years Location: Infopark, Kochi Employment Type: Full-Time

Key Responsibilities

  • Handle end-to-end recruitment for various IT positions across different technologies and experience levels.
  • Source candidates through Naukri, LinkedIn, job portals, social media platforms, referrals, and networking channels.
  • Screen resumes and conduct initial candidate assessments to evaluate technical and behavioral fit.
  • Coordinate and schedule interviews with hiring managers and technical panels.
  • Manage candidate engagement throughout the recruitment process.
  • Negotiate compensation packages and facilitate offer rollouts.
  • Maintain and update candidate databases and recruitment trackers.
  • Build and maintain a strong talent pipeline for current and future hiring needs.
  • Work closely with hiring managers to understand role requirements and hiring priorities.
  • Ensure a positive candidate experience throughout the hiring process.
  • Meet recruitment targets and timelines while maintaining quality standards.

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Bachelor's degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
  • Minimum 5+ years of experience in IT recruitment.
  • Strong hands-on experience with Naukri, LinkedIn Recruiter, and other sourcing platforms.
  • Proven track record of handling end-to-end recruitment independently.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  • Strong negotiation and stakeholder management abilities.
  • Good understanding of IT technologies, technical roles, and industry trends.
  • Ability to manage multiple positions simultaneously in a fast-paced environment.
  • Experience with ATS and recruitment management tools is an added advantage.

Contact: Share your resume at careers@thomsuninfocare.com
summary: Seeking a Technical Recruiter with 5+ years in IT recruitment to manage end-to-end hiring, source candidates via Naukri/LinkedIn, and build talent pipelines.

job_description:
Sales Executive / Sales Engineer (PPE)

Vortexen Dynamics Industrial Solutions – Kochi Back-End Office

Location: Kochi, Kerala Job Type: Full-Time

About Vortexen

Vortexen Dynamics Industrial Solutions is a UAE-based engineering and industrial services company serving the Oil & Gas, Marine, Nuclear, Power, Construction, and Industrial sectors. We supply Industrial Safety Equipment and Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) across the UAE and GCC.

Position Overview

The Sales Executive / Sales Engineer (PPE) will drive business development and sales from the Kochi office. Responsibilities include client identification, lead generation, quotation preparation, and supporting UAE market growth.

Key Responsibilities

Sales & Business Development - Generate new business opportunities in UAE/GCC markets - Identify clients and project opportunities - Promote PPE and industrial safety products - Maintain customer relationships and achieve sales targets

Lead Generation - Conduct market research and identify target companies - Generate leads via LinkedIn, Google, and industrial portals - Build customer databases and identify decision-makers

Client Communication - Conduct outbound calls and sales discussions - Follow up on quotations and coordinate meetings - Maintain regular client communication

Quotation & Proposal Support - Prepare quotations and coordinate with suppliers - Support negotiations and order closures

Product & Supplier Coordination - Collaborate with manufacturers and distributors - Recommend PPE solutions based on client needs

Market Research - Monitor industry trends and competitor activities - Identify new products and business opportunities

Products & Solutions

Promote: - Safety Helmets, Shoes, Coveralls, FR Clothing - Gloves, Goggles, Respirators, Gas Detectors - Fall Protection, SCBA Systems, Fire & Safety Equipment

Mandatory Requirements

AI Tools Experience (Mandatory) - Practical experience with AI tools for: - Lead Generation - Market Research - Proposal Preparation - Sales Communication - Customer Research - Productivity Improvement - Examples: ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, Microsoft Copilot

Preferred Skills

  • Technical Sales
  • PPE/Industrial Sales
  • Lead Generation
  • Business Development
  • CRM Software
  • Communication Skills

Preferred Industry Experience

  • PPE Industry
  • Industrial Safety Equipment
  • Oil & Gas
  • Construction
  • Marine
  • Manufacturing

Qualifications

  • Diploma/Bachelor’s in Engineering, Marketing, or Business Administration
  • Freshers with strong communication and AI tool experience may apply
  • Previous PPE/industrial sales experience preferred

What We Offer

  • Exposure to UAE/GCC markets
  • International client interaction
  • AI-driven sales environment
  • Career growth and performance-based incentives
  • Professional sales training
  • Collaboration with leading industrial clients

How to Apply

Send your updated CV to: hr@vortexen.com Subject: Application – Sales Executive / Sales Engineer (PPE)

Work Location: In-person

Candidates with PPE sales, lead generation, and AI tool experience will be prioritized.
summary: Seeking a Sales Executive/Sales Engineer (PPE) to drive UAE/GCC business development using AI tools and technical sales expertise.

job_description:

Vortexen Dynamics Industrial Solutions – Kochi Back-End Office

job_description:
Video Editor Intern

We seek dynamic and innovative video editing and graphic designing interns to join our team. This internship is designed to provide you with valuable skills and real-world experience in a fast-paced and creative environment.

Responsibilities

  • Handle end-to-end video production, from ideation and planning to editing and publishing.

job_description:
About The Role

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Logistics Executive to coordinate shipment activities and support day-to-day logistics operations in a fast-paced aviation environment.

Key Responsibilities - Coordinate domestic and international shipments. - Generate and process invoices for customer orders accurately. - Verify and complete all order transactions in the ERP system accurately. - Track shipments and ensure timely delivery. - Prepare and maintain logistics documents and records. - Coordinate with freight forwarders, transport providers, vendors, and internal teams. - Handle shipment updates and support resolution of logistics-related issues. - Ensure compliance with company procedures and documentation standards.

Requirements - Bachelor’s degree in any discipline. - 1–2 years of experience in logistics, supply chain, or aviation operations. - Good understanding of shipment coordination and logistics documentation. - Strong communication, coordination, and organizational skills. - Proficiency in MS Office and email communication. - Ability to work in a fast-paced environment with attention to detail.

Contact If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@alphasky.aero.
summary: Coordinates domestic/international shipments, manages logistics documentation, and ensures compliance in a fast-paced aviation environment.

job_description:
Flutter - iOS Developer - 4+ Years

We are seeking a talented and passionate iOS and Flutter Developer to join our development team. In this role, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining cross-platform applications using Flutter for mobile (iOS and Android), web, and desktop (Windows/macOS/Linux) platforms. You will work closely with product managers, designers, and other engineers to deliver exceptional user experiences that run seamlessly across devices.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and maintain high-performance, reusable, and reliable Flutter and iOS code for cross-platform and iOS-specific applications.
  • Build adaptive and responsive UIs for various platforms (mobile, web, desktop).
  • Integrate RESTful APIs and third-party services into applications.
  • Ensure the best possible performance, quality, and responsiveness of the applications.
  • Collaborate with UI/UX designers and backend developers to define and deliver new features.
  • Write unit, widget, and integration tests to ensure code quality.
  • Participate in code reviews, sprint planning, and other Agile processes.
  • Plug-ins and video processing using Android and iOS.

Qualifications

Must-Have: - 4+ years of experience in software development, with at least 2 years using Flutter/Dart and 2 years in using iOS-specific platforms like Swift. - Strong portfolio of Flutter and iOS apps published on the App Store, Google Play, web, or desktop. - Proficiency in building responsive and adaptive UI across devices and screen sizes. - Hands-on experience in integrating backend services and APIs. - Experience working with cross-platform state management libraries (e.g., Provider, Riverpod, Bloc). - Strong knowledge of mobile architectures and app lifecycle. - Familiarity with native iOS development using any iOS platforms like Swift and platform channel integration. - Familiarity with Git and version control practices. - Ability to write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code.

Nice to Have (Preferred): - Experience with Kotlin Multiplatform (KMM). - Familiarity with native Android development.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at r.reshma@thinkpalm.com.
summary: Develop cross-platform mobile apps using Flutter and iOS. Requires 4+ years of experience with Flutter/Dart and iOS development.

job_title: Client Account Executive – Website Development Division-Website Development Division required for JTSi Technologies India Pvt Ltd at Kochi Infopark.
job_description:
Client Account Executive – Website Development Division

Company: JTSi Technologies India Pvt Ltd Location: Kochi Infopark

Role Overview

The Client Account Executive will serve as the primary liaison between clients, the sales team, project delivery teams, and management throughout the entire customer lifecycle. The role is responsible for requirement analysis, proposal coordination, account management, project monitoring, change request management, customer success, payment collections, and long-term client relationship development.

Key Responsibilities

  1. Client Relationship Management
  2. Manage and maintain client accounts, ensuring high customer satisfaction.
  3. Act as the primary Point of Contact (POC) for all client communications.
  4. Develop long-term relationships and understand evolving business needs.

  5. Resolve customer concerns promptly and maintain records in OfficeGaP (OG).

  6. Requirement Gathering and Scope Definition

  7. Conduct detailed discussions with clients to understand business objectives.
  8. Coordinate with the Sales Team to validate expectations and solutions.

  9. Document requirements into a Scope of Work (SOW) covering functionality, workflows, UI/UX, SEO, hosting, integrations, and scalability.

  10. Project Job Card Creation

  11. Create and maintain Project Job Cards with customer details, deliverables, timelines, risks, and commercial estimates.

  12. Ensure all project information is approved before initiation.

  13. Proposal Preparation and Commercial Coordination

  14. Coordinate with teams to prepare technical and commercial proposals.
  15. Facilitate internal reviews, finalize pricing, and submit proposals to the Sales Team.

  16. Support contract finalization (MSA, NDA, SOW, PO).

  17. Project Account Management

  18. Own the customer account post-approval and serve as the Single Point of Contact (SPOC).

  19. Monitor project progress, conduct reviews, and escalate risks.

  20. Change Request and Scope Management

  21. Document out-of-scope requests via formal Change Request (CR) procedures.

  22. Coordinate with technical teams for cost estimates and obtain written approvals.

  23. Delivery, Acceptance, and Closure

  24. Coordinate UAT, deployment, handover, and sign-off.

  25. Facilitate project completion reports and post-deployment support.

  26. Revenue Realization and Collections

  27. Follow up on invoices, receivables, and payments.

  28. Escalate collection risks and track project profitability.

  29. Customer Success and After-Sales Support

  30. Maintain relationships post-completion and identify upsell opportunities (AMC, SEO, digital marketing, mobile apps, AI).

  31. Business Development Support

    • Partner with clients for new opportunities and support revenue growth.

  32. Risk Management

    • Identify and mitigate project, commercial, and customer risks.

  33. Reporting and Documentation

    • Submit weekly/monthly reports and maintain accurate records in OfficeGaP (OG).

Required Skills & Experience

Education: - Bachelor's Degree in Commerce, Business Administration, IT, Computer Science, Marketing, or related fields. - MBA preferred.

Experience: - 3–8 years in Account Management, Client Relationship Management, or Business Development. - Experience in Website Development, IT Services, SaaS, or Digital Marketing preferred. - Offshore/USA IT Services or GCC experience advantageous.

Technical Knowledge: - Website Development Lifecycle, UI/UX concepts, SEO, Hosting, Domain Management, Digital Platforms. - Proposal writing, Scope Definition, Change Management. - CRM and Project Management tools.

Core Competencies: - Excellent English communication. - Customer relationship management, business analysis, proposal writing, negotiation. - Project coordination, problem-solving, documentation, revenue management.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

  • Customer Satisfaction Score (CSAT)
  • Proposal Conversion Ratio
  • Project Delivery Success Rate
  • Collection Efficiency
  • Customer Retention Rate
  • Response Time to Queries

Contact Information

Address: Third Floor, Thapasya Building, Infopark, Kochi Phone: 8939694581 / 484 4070368 Email: careers@jtsiindia.com Website: www.jtsiindia.com

Application: Share your resume at careers@jtsiindia.com
summary: Manages client accounts for website development projects, ensuring project delivery, customer satisfaction, and revenue growth through effective relationship management and coordination.

job_title: Manager – Website Development Division required for JTSi Technologies India Pvt Ltd at Kochi Infopark.
job_description:
Manager – Website Development Division

Company: JTSi Technologies India Pvt Ltd Location: Kochi Infopark

About the Role

The Manager – Website Development Division will lead, manage, and grow JTSi's Website Development Division by delivering high-quality website solutions, ensuring customer satisfaction, maintaining project profitability, and driving innovation. The role requires strong leadership, technical expertise, project management skills, customer engagement capabilities, and business acumen to achieve revenue, profitability, customer satisfaction, and growth objectives.

Key Responsibilities

  1. Division Leadership and Strategic Management
  2. Lead and manage the Website Development Division.
  3. Develop divisional goals, SOPs, workflows, and growth strategies aligned with corporate objectives.

  4. Monitor performance against revenue, profitability, quality, and customer satisfaction targets.

  5. Pre-Sales Solutioning and Technical Consultation

  6. Collaborate with Sales Teams during opportunity qualification.

  7. Validate project scope, recommend technology stacks, and provide technical leadership in proposals.

  8. Scope Definition and Estimation

  9. Approve SOW documents, effort estimates, and implementation plans.

  10. Minimize risks from scope ambiguity and underestimation.

  11. Website Architecture and Development Leadership

  12. Define architecture standards, ensure compliance with coding/SEO/security best practices.

  13. Oversee WordPress, custom plugins, API integrations, and advanced web applications.

  14. Project Delivery Management

  15. Ensure projects meet scope, timeline, budget, and quality standards.

  16. Monitor milestones, resolve bottlenecks, and escalate risks.

  17. Change Request Governance

  18. Review and approve change requests, protect project profitability via scope control.

  19. Team Leadership and Resource Management

  20. Recruit, mentor, and retain talent; allocate resources and identify skill gaps.

  21. Quality Assurance and Process Compliance

  22. Establish quality standards, conduct audits, and ensure SOP adherence.

  23. Hosting, Infrastructure, and Security Management

  24. Oversee hosting environments, security, backups, and infrastructure.

  25. Innovation and AI Adoption

    • Implement emerging technologies and AI tools for productivity and customer value.

  26. Customer Success and Relationship Support

    • Support Account Executives in customer relationships and escalations.

  27. Financial and Profitability Management

    • Monitor profitability, recommend pricing improvements, and support revenue targets.

  28. Reporting and Governance

    • Submit performance reports, maintain dashboards, and conduct management reviews.

Mandatory Responsibilities

  • Daily project progress reviews and resource allocation.
  • Weekly project meetings, monthly team reviews, and KPI dashboard maintenance.
  • Ensure all activities are documented in OfficeGaP.

Required Qualifications

Education: - Bachelor's in Computer Science/IT/Software Engineering; Master's/MBA preferred.

Experience: - 8–12 years in Website Development/IT Services; 3–5 years leading technical teams. - Proven experience managing international (US-based) clients and distributed teams.

Technical Skills: - WordPress Development, Website Architecture, UI/UX Design, API Integration, Cloud Hosting, Database Management, SEO, DevOps, AI Tools, Agile/Scrum.

Leadership Competencies: - Strategic Thinking, Customer-Centric Leadership, Team Building, Project Management, Commercial Awareness, Innovation Leadership.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

  • Project Delivery Success Rate, CSAT, Project Gross Margin, Resource Utilization, Website Quality Index, Customer Retention, Division Revenue Growth.

Success Measure

A successful candidate will deliver profitable, high-quality solutions, build a high-performing team, drive innovation, and contribute to JTSi's growth and profitability.

Contact Information

Address: Third Floor, Thapasya Building, Infopark, Kochi Phone: 8939694581 / 484 4070368 Email: careers@jtsiindia.com Website: www.jtsiindia.com

Apply: Share your resume at careers@jtsiindia.com
summary: Lead JTSi's Website Development Division, managing projects, teams, and innovation to deliver high-quality solutions and drive profitability. Requires 8–12 years of technical leadership experience.

job_description:
Sales Engineer / Tender & Procurement Specialist

Vortexen Kochi – Back-End Operations Centre

Location: Kochi, Kerala / Remote Job Type: Full-Time

About Vortexen

Vortexen Dynamics Industrial Solutions is a UAE-based engineering and industrial services company specializing in: - Passive Fire Protection - Fire Stopping Solutions - Industrial Coatings - Oil & Gas Services - Nuclear Industry Support Services - Marine & Industrial Projects - Business Representation Services

Position Overview

We are seeking a highly motivated Sales Engineer / Tender & Procurement Specialist to support our UAE operations from our Kochi Back-End Office. The role involves sourcing products and services, managing tenders, developing supplier networks, and supporting business development activities.

Key Responsibilities

Tender Management - Identify and monitor tender opportunities. - Review RFQs, RFPs, and tender documents. - Coordinate tender participation activities. - Collect quotations from suppliers and OEMs. - Prepare commercial and technical submissions. - Support bid evaluation and tender clarification processes.

Procurement & Sourcing - Source products, materials, equipment, and services. - Obtain competitive quotations from suppliers. - Compare technical and commercial offers. - Coordinate logistics and delivery requirements. - Develop approved supplier databases.

OEM & Supplier Development - Identify new OEMs and manufacturers. - Establish strategic supplier relationships. - Negotiate pricing, credit terms, and delivery schedules. - Explore representation opportunities with international manufacturers. - Maintain supplier performance records.

Vendor Registration & Prequalification - Support ADNOC vendor registrations. - Support government and private sector vendor registrations. - Manage supplier prequalification documentation. - Coordinate registration renewals and updates.

Sales & Business Development Support - Assist in identifying new market opportunities. - Research industries, projects, and potential clients. - Support proposal preparation. - Coordinate with sales teams for business development activities.

Research & Market Intelligence - Monitor industry trends and market developments. - Identify new products and technologies. - Research competitor activities and supplier capabilities. - Develop sourcing strategies for emerging opportunities.

Mandatory Requirements

  • Procurement & Tender Experience: Applicants should have experience in procurement, sourcing, tender participation, supplier development, vendor registration, and RFQ management.
  • AI Experience (Mandatory): Applicants must be comfortable using AI tools for supplier research, tender analysis, proposal preparation, market research, documentation support, and productivity improvement. Examples include ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, Microsoft Copilot, and other AI productivity tools.

Preferred Skills

  • Procurement Management
  • Tender Management
  • Technical Sales
  • Vendor Registration
  • Supplier Negotiation
  • Market Research
  • Cost Analysis
  • Technical Documentation
  • Business Development
  • AI Tools
  • Microsoft Excel
  • ERP / Procurement Software

Preferred Industry Experience

Candidates with experience in any of the following sectors will be preferred: - Oil & Gas - Fire Protection - Industrial Services - EPC Companies - Mechanical Engineering - Electrical Engineering - Construction - Marine Industry - Nuclear Industry - Industrial Trading

Qualification

  • Diploma or Degree in Engineering (Mechanical Engineering preferred; Electrical / Civil / Industrial Engineering candidates may also apply).
  • Procurement and Tendering experience is an advantage.

What We Offer

  • Exposure to UAE & GCC Markets
  • International Procurement Experience
  • Direct Interaction with OEMs and Manufacturers
  • Career Growth Opportunities
  • Performance-Based Incentives
  • AI-Driven Work Environment
  • Opportunity to work on ADNOC and Major Industrial Projects

How to Apply

Send your updated CV to: hr@vortexen.com Subject: Application – Sales Engineer / Tender & Procurement Specialist

Candidates with experience in sourcing, OEM development, vendor registrations, procurement, tender participation, and AI-powered research tools will be given preference.

Work Location: In person

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at hr@vortexen.com.
summary: A Sales Engineer / Tender & Procurement Specialist role in Kochi supporting UAE operations, focusing on tender management, procurement, supplier development, and AI-driven research.

job_title: Business Analyst – AI, Automation & Business Development

job_description:
Senior Medical Coder - Ophthalmology

We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized medical coder with 2+ years of coding experience in Ophthalmology and laboratory procedures to join our growing team. In this position, you will play a key role in reviewing and analyzing medical billing and coding.

Requirements:

  • 2+ years of work experience in coding Ophthalmology and procedures.
  • Must possess knowledge in coding Ophthalmology and procedures.
  • Certification is mandatory from AAPC / AHIMA.
  • Exposure to CPT, ICD-10, and HCPCS coding.
  • Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time efficiently.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  • Basic Computer Skills.

Duties and Responsibilities:

  • Assign codes to diagnoses and procedures using CPT, HCPCS, ICD-10-CM.
  • Select appropriate CPT codes for Pathology and laboratory procedures.
  • Ensure proper use of modifiers.
  • Follow coding guidelines and legal requirements to maintain compliance with federal and state regulations.
  • Meet daily coding production targets.
  • Perform additional duties assigned by the coding manager as needed.
  • Demonstrate willingness for flexible shifts based on team requirements.

Contact:

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at hrd@aimagroup.co.uk.
summary: Senior Medical Coder in Ophthalmology with 2+ years experience, AAPC/AHIMA certification, and expertise in CPT/ICD-10 coding required for compliance and productivity.

job_description:
Lead Generation & Digital Marketing Executive

About the Role Plus UAE Group and Vortexen are seeking a highly motivated Lead Generation & Digital Marketing Executive with expertise in AI-powered marketing tools, automation platforms, and digital lead generation. The ideal candidate will drive business growth by generating quality B2B leads from UAE and GCC markets, executing digital campaigns, and leveraging AI for automation.

Key Responsibilities - Lead Generation - Generate B2B leads from UAE and GCC markets. - Identify target companies and decision-makers. - Build and maintain lead databases. - Generate leads via LinkedIn, Google, directories, portals, and social media. - Support sales teams with qualified leads.

  • Digital Marketing
  • Manage LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram, and Google campaigns.
  • Create and publish marketing content.
  • Execute email and WhatsApp marketing campaigns.
  • Improve website visibility and SEO performance.

  • Monitor and report campaign effectiveness.

  • AI Tools & Automation

  • Use AI tools for content creation, lead research, proposal drafting, and market analysis.
  • Create automations to improve marketing, sales, reporting, and administrative workflows.
  • Utilize AI-powered CRM and lead management systems.
  • Explore and implement new AI technologies to enhance business efficiency.
  • Integrate tools and automate repetitive processes.

Mandatory Requirements - AI Tools Experience - Practical experience with one or more of the following: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Canva AI, Microsoft Copilot, or other AI productivity tools. - Automation Experience - Experience with Zoho Flow, Zapier, Make.com, n8n, Zoho Creator, CRM Automation, Email Automation, WhatsApp Automation, or Workflow Automation.

Preferred Skills - Lead Generation - Digital Marketing - LinkedIn Marketing - Email Marketing - Social Media Marketing - SEO - CRM Management - Market Research - Data Analysis - AI Prompt Engineering - Process Automation

Qualification - Graduate/Diploma holder in Marketing, Business Administration, IT, Commerce, or related fields. - Freshers with exceptional AI and automation skills may also apply.

What We Offer - Exposure to UAE & GCC Markets - Opportunity to work with international clients - AI-driven work environment - Career growth opportunities - Flexible working arrangements - Performance-based incentives - Training on advanced business systems

Location Remote / Kochi Office

Apply Now Send your updated CV to: hr@vortexen.com
summary: Lead Generation & Digital Marketing Executive role focused on AI-driven lead generation, campaign management, and automation to drive UAE/GCC business growth.

job_description:
Trainee Medical Coder

We are seeking a detail-oriented and organized medical coder for 0 to 6 months to join our growing team. In this position, you will play a key role in reviewing and analyzing medical billing and coding.

Requirements:

  • Must possess knowledge of anatomy and ICD and CPT guidelines
  • Certification is mandatory from AAPC / AHIMA
  • Exposure to CPT, ICD-10, and HCPCS coding
  • Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time efficiently
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills
  • Basic computer skills

Duties and Responsibilities:

  • Assign codes to diagnoses and procedures using CPT, HCPCS, ICD-10-CM
  • Select appropriate CPT codes for pathology and laboratory procedures
  • Proper use of modifiers
  • Follow coding guidelines and legal requirements to ensure compliance with federal and state regulations
  • Meet daily coding production targets
  • Perform additional duties assigned by the coding manager as needed
  • Willingness for flexible shifts based on team requirements

Contact: Share your updated resume at hrd@aimagroup.co.uk
summary: Trainee Medical Coder for 0-6 months. Requires AAPC/AHIMA certification and CPT, ICD-10, HCPCS coding skills.

job_description:
Growth Marketing Manager

The Growth Marketing Manager will be responsible for building a scalable growth engine across multiple group companies from the ground up. The role will focus on driving qualified pipeline through viral loops, referral systems, and content-led demand generation aligned with defined ICPs.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design and launch viral loops and referral programmes using free tools, shareable content, and client incentives to generate self-reinforcing lead
  • Own full-funnel demand generation across paid channels (LinkedIn Ads, Google Ads) and organic channels (SEO, LinkedIn content)
  • Manage account-based marketing initiatives, email nurture campaigns, and event-to-pipeline conversion strategies
  • Build and run structured growth experiments quarterly, focusing on rapid testing, eliminating low-performing initiatives, and scaling successful strategies
  • Manage Zoho CRM and Zoho Marketing Automation workflows (lead scoring, drip campaigns, SDR handoff, attribution tracking)
  • Drive LinkedIn thought leadership programmes across leadership profiles with consistent posting cadence
  • Create high-quality fintech content (payment flow explainers, operational playbooks, compliance guides) for technical decision-makers

Must-Have Skills & Experience

  • 5–10 years of experience in growth marketing, demand generation, or performance marketing
  • At least 3 years in B2B tech services, SaaS, or fintech
  • Proven experience building growth systems in IT services companies
  • Demonstrated track record in viral loops, referral engines, or product-led growth with measurable pipeline impact
  • Strong analytical capabilities (dashboards, lead scoring, multi-touch attribution, A/B testing)
  • Proficiency in data handling using SQL or advanced spreadsheets
  • Excellent English communication skills targeting UK/EU financial services audiences
  • Hands-on experience with LinkedIn Campaign Manager, Google Ads, SEO tools (Ahrefs/SEMrush), and AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Codex, Gemini)

Tech Stack

  • Zoho CRM & Marketing Automation
  • Google Analytics 4
  • LinkedIn Campaign Manager & Google Ads
  • Apollo.io
  • Ahrefs/SEMrush
  • Canva
  • AI tools (Claude, Codex, Gemini)
  • Automation tools (Zapier/Make)
  • Landing page & A/B testing experience

Contact: Share your resume at lavanya.a@arttechgroup.com
summary: Builds scalable growth engines for fintech companies through viral loops, demand generation, and data-driven marketing strategies. Requires 5–10 years in B2B tech growth marketing.

job_description:
Accountant

Location: Infopark Koratty Experience Required: Minimum 2 Years Employment Type: Full-Time

Job Summary

We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Accountant to manage daily accounting operations, financial records, invoicing, taxation support, and bookkeeping activities. The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience in Tally, QuickBooks, GST, TDS, and Zoho Books with strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial reporting.

Key Responsibilities

  • Handle day-to-day accounting and bookkeeping activities
  • Maintain accurate financial records and ledgers
  • Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable
  • Prepare invoices, purchase orders, and payment follow-ups
  • Perform bank reconciliation and account reconciliation
  • Maintain GST, TDS, and other statutory compliance records
  • Generate MIS reports and financial statements
  • Record journal entries and process vendor payments
  • Coordinate with auditors and support audit activities
  • Maintain payroll-related accounting entries if required
  • Ensure proper documentation and filing of financial records

Required Skills

  • Minimum 2 years of accounting experience
  • Hands-on experience in:
  • Tally
  • QuickBooks
  • Zoho Books
  • GST
  • TDS
  • Bank Reconciliation
  • Financial Reporting
  • Bookkeeping
  • Proficiency in MS Excel and accounting documentation
  • Strong attention to detail and accuracy
  • Good communication and organizational skills

Educational Qualification

  • B.Com / M.Com / Finance-related qualification

Preferred Candidate Profile

  • Female candidates preferred
  • Candidates residing nearby Koratty/Chalakudy locations will be given preference
  • Immediate joiners are an advantage
  • Ability to work independently and handle multiple accounting tasks

Contact: For applications, email your updated resume to career@exacoreitsolutions.com
summary: Experienced Accountant needed for financial operations, invoicing, and compliance using Tally, QuickBooks, and GST. Requires 2+ years and strong attention to detail.

job_description:
About the Role

We are seeking a motivated and enthusiastic Business Development Executive Intern to join our team. The selected candidate will assist in identifying new business opportunities, generating leads, maintaining client relationships, and supporting the sales team in achieving business growth objectives.

job_description:
Customer Experience (CX) Advisor – Night Shift

Role Overview

We are seeking Customer Experience (CX) Advisors to support our UK operations through a 24x7 customer service model. The role will involve delivering high-quality customer support across multiple client accounts through voice, chat, email, and back-office channels while ensuring an exceptional customer experience.

Key Responsibilities

  • Handle customer enquiries and service requests through inbound and outbound voice calls, live chat, and email channels.
  • Provide timely, accurate, and professional responses to customer queries while maintaining high customer satisfaction levels.
  • Investigate and resolve customer issues, escalating complex cases to the relevant teams where required.
  • Perform back-office support activities including data updates, account administration, ticket management, and documentation.
  • Maintain detailed and accurate records of all customer interactions within CRM and support systems.
  • Meet or exceed agreed Service Level Agreements (SLAs), quality standards, and productivity targets.
  • Support multiple client accounts and adapt to varying customer service processes and requirements.
  • Identify opportunities for process improvements and contribute to enhancing the overall customer experience.

Required Skills & Experience

  • Previous experience in a Customer Service, Customer Support, Contact Centre, Helpdesk, or Customer Experience role.
  • Strong verbal and written English communication skills.
  • Experience handling voice, chat, and email support channels.
  • Ability to manage multiple tasks and work effectively in a fast-paced environment.
  • Strong problem-solving skills with a customer-first mindset.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office and CRM/ticketing platforms.

Preferred Experience

  • Experience supporting UK, US, or international customers.
  • Exposure to telecom, technology, SaaS, utilities, financial services, or managed services environments.
  • Experience working in rotational shifts and 24x7 support operations.

Shift Pattern

  • 12-hour shifts operating on a 3 Days On / 3 Days Off rotation.
  • Night shift coverage supporting UK operations.
  • Flexibility to support business requirements across multiple client accounts.

Education

  • Graduate in any discipline preferred.
  • Relevant customer service certifications are advantageous.

Key Competencies

  • Customer Focus
  • Effective Communication
  • Empathy & Active Listening
  • Problem Solving
  • Attention to Detail
  • Team Collaboration
  • Adaptability & Resilience

Contact: If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at shabeek.s@arttechgroup.com.
summary: Customer Experience Advisor needed for night shifts, providing multichannel support to UK clients. Requires 5+ years in customer service with CRM proficiency.

job_description:
Senior IT Support & Infrastructure Engineer

Location: Remote Shift Pattern: Operational hours aligned with UK business requirements (flexibility for rotational or out-of-hours deployment). 5 days over 7, including some weekend work. Working hours: 7am GMT – 4pm GMT.

Role Overview

Operating as the primary offshore deputy to the UK-based IT Manager, this autonomous role in a fast-paced Fintech BPO environment requires end-to-end technical ownership of service desk operations, infrastructure, security compliance, and client implementation pipelines. The role demands a blend of technical expertise, security framework adherence, and hands-on cloud infrastructure experience.

Key Responsibilities

  1. Operations & Service Management
  2. Act as lead for IT Support tickets, managing hardware, software, and access management lifecycles.

  3. Develop automation workflows (e.g., scripting) to reduce ticket volume and improve efficiency. Ownership of an RMM product is preferred.

  4. Cloud & Contact-Centre Infrastructure

  5. Serve as a secondary AWS administrator for infrastructure optimization, cost auditing, IAM policies, and environment monitoring.
  6. Manage and troubleshoot cloud contact-centre environments (e.g., Amazon Connect for routing profiles, call flows, and releases).

  7. Support next-generation network access layers (e.g., Cloudflare Zero Trust).

  8. Identity, Assets & Compliance

  9. Orchestrate joiner/mover/leaver (JML) lifecycle for identities across Microsoft 365, AWS, and Bitwarden.
  10. Enforce secure endpoint provisioning via MDM (Intune) and contribute to policy changes.
  11. Ensure compliance with standards like PCI DSS and Cyber Essentials.
  12. Architect and maintain technical documentation, SOPs, and self-help repositories.

Candidate Profile & Requirements

Essential Technical Experience: - 5+ Years of progressive IT infrastructure, system administration, or high-tier service desk operations. - Hands-on cloud infrastructure navigation and support. - Deep Microsoft 365 admin expertise (Exchange, Teams, SharePoint, Azure AD/Entra ID). - Practical Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) and modern firewall experience. - Regulated sector experience (Fintech, Banking, BPO) is advantageous.

Desirable Attributes & Certifications: - Certifications: CompTIA A+, ITIL, AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner/Solutions Architect, Microsoft Associate. - Scripting/data environment exposure and development understanding. - Autonomy in remote work with self-motivation and ownership. - Strong English communication for stakeholder interfacing. - Analytical troubleshooting for root-cause resolution.

Contact: For inquiries, email shabeek.s@arttechgroup.com with your updated resume.
summary: Senior IT Support & Infrastructure Engineer role in a Fintech BPO environment, requiring 5+ years of cloud infrastructure, security compliance, and automation expertise.

job_description:
Technical Support Engineer

We are seeking an experienced Engineer with expertise in Windows Servers, Web, and Database environments across on-premises and cloud platforms. The role involves managing, optimizing, and supporting complex infrastructures to ensure high performance and reliability.

Skills Required

  • 1+ years of experience providing L2/L3 level Technical Support in the following technologies:
  • Experience in configuring, troubleshooting IIS web Servers, Windows Servers, and application hosting.
  • Experience in MS SQL Server database installation, configuration, and maintenance.
  • Experience programming and scripting languages like PowerShell, Bash, Python, C#, Node.JS, etc., to automate tasks and streamline processes.
  • Leverage AI tools such as OpenAI Platform, Microsoft Copilot, and GitHub Copilot to enhance solution design.
  • Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues related to network, servers, web services, and databases.
  • Root cause analysis skills to identify underlying problems and implement effective solutions.
  • Expertise in analyzing app logs and debug issues to identify root causes and implement solutions.
  • Experience in prioritizing incidents, coordinating with relevant teams, and providing timely updates to stakeholders.
  • Experienced in working with software systems hosted on public cloud platforms such as Azure and AWS.
  • Understanding of cloud security principles and best practices to ensure secure cloud deployments.
  • Familiarity with AWS services including EC2, S3, RDS, IAM, VPC, Route 53, Lambda, CloudFormation, etc.
  • AWS CloudWatch for monitoring resource utilization, setting up alarms, and gathering performance metrics.
  • Understanding of AWS Lambda for building serverless applications and event-driven functions.
  • Hands-on experience in networking concepts such as TCP/IP, routing, firewall, WAF, and load balancing.
  • Experience with AWS Command Line Interface (CLI) for programmatic interaction with AWS services.
  • Understanding of key Azure services, VMs, Azure App Services, Azure SQL DB, Azure Storage, Azure AD, etc.
  • Knowledge of Azure Virtual Network, subnets, network security groups (NSGs), and Azure Load Balancer.
  • SQL Server failover cluster instances, or High availability always on database configuration.
  • Ability to maintain high levels of customer information security and compliance.
  • Chat, email, and voice support experience. Exceptional oral and written communication skills.
  • Knowledgeable in using CRM tools like Zoho.

Responsibilities

  • Provide technical support to a diverse, global customer base.
  • Troubleshoot Windows servers, desktop, and database environments to identify and resolve technical problems.
  • Ability to explain complex technical concepts in a clear and concise manner.
  • Skilled in prioritizing and escalating customer issues based on their severity.
  • Consistent in providing timely updates on tasks to align with severity levels.
  • Demonstrates both teamwork and autonomy in a work setting.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to resolve complex problems and escalate issues as necessary.
  • Preparing documentation/knowledge base documents.
  • Takes a proactive approach to work independently and without close supervision.
  • Willingness to work on rotational 24/7 shifts. Work will be 8 hours/day on 5 days (40 hours) a week.
  • Flexible to work shifts and weekends as needed.

Application Details

Email your application to hr@empressinfotech.com with the subject line "Technical Support Engineer". Please attach your resume, along with the following details to be considered for the position: 1. Your relevant experience in the field. 2. Your Current location. 3. The notice period required to join if got selected. 4. Current remuneration and salary expectations.
summary: Technical Support Engineer role requiring L2/L3 support for Windows, cloud (AWS/Azure), and database environments. Responsibilities include troubleshooting, automation, and collaboration with teams to resolve complex technical issues.

job_description:

This role combines technical expertise, problem-solving skills, and customer interaction to ensure seamless product deployment, troubleshooting, and post-implementation support.

job_description:
Implementation and Technical Support Engineer

We are seeking a skilled Implementation and Technical Support Engineer with expertise in Windows Server, Web Server, and Database environments to deliver production support and implement our software solutions. In this role, you’ll collaborate with a global team of technical support engineers in India and the US to provide comprehensive support to customers worldwide.

Responsibilities:

  • Provide technical support for Windows Servers, IIS Servers, MS SQL Servers, and AWS cloud platforms.
  • Install, configure, secure, and maintain Windows Servers.
  • Install, configure, and maintain SQL Server.
  • Set up IIS, deploy web applications on Windows Servers, and support web-based applications in production.
  • Conduct functional, performance, and usability testing of software.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues related to servers, web services, databases, and networks.
  • Diagnose, document, and track technical issues to ensure prompt resolution.

Requirements:

  • 1+ years of experience in L2/L3 Technical Support for the following technologies:
  • Windows Server and IIS Web Server administration.
  • MS SQL Server installation, configuration, and administration.
  • Networking concepts (FTP, HTTP, DNS, Active Directory).
  • AWS services (EC2, S3, RDS, IAM, VPC, Route 53, Lambda, CloudFormation).
  • Azure services (VMs, App Services, SQL DB, Storage, AD).
  • AI tools (OpenAI, Microsoft Copilot, GitHub Copilot) for solution design.
  • Strong troubleshooting, diagnostic, and analytical skills.
  • Excellent written/verbal communication and customer service abilities.
  • Knowledge of software implementation processes.

How to Apply:

Email your resume to hr@empressinfotech.com with the subject "Implementation and Technical Support Engineer" and include: - Experience in technical support. - Current location. - Notice period required to join. - Current remuneration and expected salary.

Work Hours:

  • Rotational shifts (24/7).
  • 8–9 hours/day, 5 days/week (40 hours/week).

Location:

  • Infopark Kochi, Hybrid or WFH.
summary: Seeking an Implementation and Technical Support Engineer to deliver production support and software implementation in Windows, web server, and database environments with expertise in AWS and Azure.

job_description:
Sales Executive

Are you someone who loves talking to people, can spot the right customer from a mile away, and knows how to close a deal? We are looking for a highly motivated Sales Executive who can identify the right customers, engage them directly, walk them through the product experience, and convert them into paying clients.

What you'll do:

  • Identify and reach out to the right target customers directly
  • Conduct live product demos and teach customers how to use the platform
  • Close deals and onboard new clients end-to-end
  • Research and connect with international clients and schedule intro meetings
  • Build and manage a healthy sales pipeline

You're a great fit if you:

  • Have 1-2 years of B2B / D2C / SaaS sales experience
  • Are a confident communicator — in English + Malayalam
  • Can work independently and hit targets without hand-holding
  • Are comfortable with international outreach and different time zones
  • Have a passion for tech products and love explaining things simply

What's on offer:
